raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5x5x8 cm) is directly in front of the lighter box and within reach of the right arm. There is enough clearance for the claw to approach from the side without colliding with either box.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table area front-right, away from all boxes",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right region of the table is free of objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the specified area of the table, leaving the space in front of both boxes unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can approach the left and right faces of the darker box (30 cm wide). The cup has been cleared, and there is no obstruction in front or at the sides of the box. The table surface is stable to support brief sliding if micro-adjustments are needed.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5x5x8 cm) is directly in front of the lighter box and within reach of the right arm. There is enough clearance for the claw to approach from the side without colliding with either box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop.

parsed_json.Target: table area front-right, away from all boxes
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-right region of the table is free of objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the specified area of the table, leaving the space in front of both boxes unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can approach the left and right faces of the darker box (30 cm wide). The cup has been cleared, and there is no obstruction in front or at the sides of the box. The table surface is stable to support brief sliding if micro-adjustments are needed.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task.
